iree_add_all_subdirs()

add_custom_command(OUTPUT amdgpu_abi_bitcode_hdrs.stamp
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch amdgpu_abi_bitcode_hdrs.stamp
  DEPENDS
    "command_buffer.h"
    "common.h"
    "kernel_args.h"
    "kernel_descriptor.h"
    "profile.h"
    "queue.h"
    "signal.h"
    "timestamp.h"
)

add_custom_target(amdgpu_abi_bitcode_hdrs
    DEPENDS amdgpu_abi_bitcode_hdrs.stamp
)

iree_cc_library(
  NAME
    abi
  HDRS
    "command_buffer.h"
    "common.h"
    "kernel_args.h"
    "kernel_descriptor.h"
    "profile.h"
    "queue.h"
    "signal.h"

    hsa_runtime::headers

)
